item.title: No arrests made after police search residence near Nancy Guthrie's home
item.description: A search has been carried out in Tuscon, Arizona, close to where the 84-year-old was abducted nearly two weeks ago.

item.title: Rubio says US and Europe 'belong together' despite tensions
item.description: The US secretary of state reassures European leaders that the Trump administration backs the transatlantic alliance.

item.title: Cuban cigar festival called off as US blockade worsens energy crisis
item.description: The annual aficionados' bonanza has been postponed until further notice as shortages affect international travel.

item.title: Russia killed opposition leader Alexei Navalny using dart frog toxin, UK says
item.description: There is no innocent explanation for the toxin being found in samples taken from Navalny's body, Foreign Office says.

item.title: Planned US-funded baby vaccine trial in Guinea-Bissau blasted by WHO
item.description: Giving some newborns in Guinea-Bissau an established hepatitis B treatment but not others is "unethical", it says.
